title: 10 best herbal creams for hormonal imbalance

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dong quai creams helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain a unique blend of herbs that work in harmony to regulate the body's endocrine system. The cream's active ingredients, including angelica sinensis and licorice root, help to normalize hormone production, alleviating symptoms such as hot flashes, mood swings, and irregular periods. By balancing estrogen and progesterone levels, dong quai creams promote overall hormonal balance, leading to improved reproductive health and reduced menstrual distress.
remedy_properties: Estrogen-like properties: Dong Quai contains phytoestrogens, which mimic the effects of estrogen in the body, helping to balance and regulate hormone levels, particularly during menopause.

Anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties: The antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds in Dong Quai creams help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which can contribute to hormonal imbalance and symptoms like hot flashes and mood swings.

Blood circulation-enhancing properties: Dong Quai is known to dilate blood vessels and improve circulation, which helps regulate hormone production and balance by increasing the flow of hormones throughout the body.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of dong quai are rich in bioactive compounds, making them an excellent choice for creating creams that balance hormones and alleviate symptoms associated with menopause.
Barks: The barks of dong quai contain flavonoids and saponins, which help to regulate estrogen levels and reduce hot flashes, making them a popular ingredient in hormonal imbalance creams.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of dried angelica sinensis roots and chop them into small pieces.
Combine the chopped angelica sinensis roots with 500 milliliters of boiling distilled water for 30 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth into a clean glass container and discard solids.
Mix 20 grams of beeswax and 10 grams of coconut oil in a double boiler until melted and well combined.
Add the strained herbal infusion to the melted wax-oil mixture and stir until it thickens after 10 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chamomile creams helps with hormonal imbalance because of its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation. The herbal extract has a natural affinity for the body's endocrine system, gently supporting the regulation of hormones. As it calms the skin and nervous system, chamomile cream can help stabilize hormonal fluctuations, alleviating symptoms such as acne, mood swings, and hot flashes associated with hormonal imbalance. Its gentle, non-invasive approach makes it a natural and effective solution for achieving hormonal balance and promoting overall well-being.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant and Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Chamomile's antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the body, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances by reducing the negative effects of cortisol and other hormones.

Hormone-Supporting Compounds: Chamomile contains flavonoids and phenolic acids that have been shown to support hormone production and regulation, particularly for estrogen and progesterone, which can help alleviate symptoms of PMS, menopause, and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS).

Calming and Relaxing Effects: The soothing and calming properties of chamomile cream can help reduce stress and anxiety, which are often linked to hormonal imbalances. By promoting relaxation and reducing cortisol levels, chamomile creams can help regulate the body's natural hormonal rhythms.
remedy_parts: Roots: Chamomile roots have a calming effect on the body and can help regulate hormonal imbalances by reducing stress and anxiety.
Flowers: Chamomile flowers have anti-inflammatory properties that can soothe and calm skin irritation caused by hormonal fluctuations.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh matricaria chamomilla flowers in the early morning and dry them properly.
Measure out 50g of dried matricaria chamomilla flowers and combine them with 200ml of cold-pressed coconut oil in a heatproof glass measuring cup.
Place the mixture in a double boiler or a saucepan set over simmering water for 30 minutes to infuse the oil.
Strain the infused oil through a cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean glass bottle discarding the solids and storing the oil in the refrigerator.
Mix the infused oil with 50g of beeswax and heat gently over low heat until melted and well combined preparing a batch of matricaria chamomilla creams.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Hawthorn creams helps with hormonal imbalance because of its adaptogenic properties, which allow it to harmonize the body's endocrine system. The cream contains bioactive compounds that target specific hormonal receptors, regulating and balancing hormone production. This can alleviate symptoms such as hot flashes, mood swings, and sleep disturbances associated with menopause and PMS. Additionally, hawthorn's ability to improve circulation and reduce inflammation can help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue and thyroid imbalance, promoting overall hormonal balance and well-being.
remedy_properties: Oestrogenic activity: Hawthorn cream contains flavonoids that have oestrogenic effects, which can help balance hormone levels by stimulating the production of estrogen in the body.

Anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties: Hawthorn's anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds can reduce inflammation and oxidative stress caused by hormonal imbalance, promoting a more stable hormonal environment.

Vasodilatory and cardiovascular support: Hawthorn's ability to dilate blood vessels and improve cardiovascular function can help alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance such as hot flashes, mood swings, and fatigue.
remedy_parts: Roots: Hawthorn roots have been traditionally used to regulate menstruation and alleviate symptoms of menopause due to their flavonoid content, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
Buds: Hawthorn buds are rich in flavonoids and saponins, making them effective in balancing hormonal levels by reducing inflammation and promoting healthy estrogen metabolism.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh crataegus monogyna leaves and stems, ensuring they are free of contaminants and pests.
Dry the harvested plant material in a warm, dry environment for 7-10 days to reduce moisture content.
Combine 50 grams of dried crataegus monogyna with 100 milliliters of cold-pressed olive oil in a glass container.
Infuse the mixture by placing it in a dark cupboard for 14 days, shaking the container daily to facilitate extraction.
Strain and filter the infused mixture through cheesecloth or a coffee filter, discarding any solids.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric creams helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain curcumin, a powerful anti-inflammatory compound that targets estrogen receptors in the body. Curcumin has been shown to regulate hormone production, reducing excess estrogen and alleviating symptoms of hormonal imbalances such as acne, mood swings, and hot flashes. By reducing inflammation and promoting balance, turmeric creams can help normalize hormonal function, leading to improved overall health and well-being.
remedy_properties: Curcumin: Curcumin, a polyphenol compound found in turmeric, has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances.

Bioavailability Enhancers: Turmeric creams often include bioavailability enhancers like black pepper or ginger, which increase the absorption of curcumin into the bloodstream, allowing it to reach target tissues and organs more effectively and interact with hormones.

Adaptogenic Effects: Turmeric has been shown to have adaptogenic properties, meaning it helps the body adapt to stress and hormonal fluctuations by regulating cortisol levels and promoting balance in the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal (HPA) axis.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Turmeric rhyzomes are rich in curcumin, a powerful anti-inflammatory compound that helps regulate hormonal balance and reduce symptoms of hormonal imbalance such as acne and hyperpigmentation.
Roots: The roots of the turmeric plant contain volatile oils that have been traditionally used to treat menstrual cramps, bloating, and other symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances in women.
remedy_recipe: Extract the active compounds from 100 grams of dried curcuma longa powder using 500ml of high-proof ethanol at room temperature for 2 hours.
Combine 50 grams of extracted curcuma longa oil with 20 grams of sweet almond oil and 10 grams of beeswax in a heat-resistant glass bowl.
Melt the mixture by placing the bowl over a pot of simmering water and stirring occasionally until the beeswax is fully incorporated, taking approximately 30 minutes to prepare.
Remove the bowl from the heat and let it cool slightly before whipping the mixture with a hand mixer or whisk for about 5 minutes to achieve a smooth consistency.
Fill sterilized glass jars with the curcuma longa cream and store them in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 6 months, allowing the cream to set at room temperature before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice creams helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain a compound called glycyrrhizin, which has been shown to mimic the effects of progesterone in the body. This can help to regulate and balance hormone levels, particularly for women experiencing symptoms of menopause or polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS). By reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation, licorice creams can also help to alleviate symptoms such as hot flashes, mood swings, and anxiety associated with hormonal imbalance.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: Glycyrrhizin, a compound found in licorice root, has been shown to help regulate hormones by increasing the production of progesterone and decreasing the production of cortisol, leading to a more balanced hormonal environment.

Flavonoids: Flavonoids present in herbal licorice creams have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce stress and anxiety, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances by disrupting the body's natural hormonal rhythms.

Phytoestrogens: Licorice root contains phytoestrogens, plant-based compounds that mimic the effects of estrogen in the body. These phytoestrogens can help balance estrogen levels and alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalance, such as hot flashes and mood swings.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in glycyrrhizin, a compound that helps balance hormones and reduce inflammation.
Rhyzomes: Contains flavonoids and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, beneficial for regulating hormone production.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of dried glycyrrhiza glabra roots and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix the powdered root extract with 500ml of cold-pressed sweet almond oil and 200ml of coconut oil in a double boiler for 30 minutes.
Add 20 drops of vitamin e oil and 10 drops of jojoba oil to the mixture and stir well for an additional 5 minutes.
Pour the mixture into sterilized glass jars and store them in the refrigerator at a temperature below 40°c for 2 weeks to allow infusion.
After 2 weeks, shake the jars daily for 1 week and then filter the cream through a cheesecloth to remove any sediment before transferring it to a clean container for use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: St John's Wort creams helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain hyperforin, a natural compound that has been shown to regulate and balance hormones in the body. The cream works by targeting hormone receptors in the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting normalization of cortisol and estrogen levels. This can lead to improved mood stability, reduced stress and anxiety, and alleviated symptoms of menopause and PMS. Additionally, St John's Wort creams may also help to increase serotonin levels, promoting a sense of calm and well-being.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic properties: St John's Wort creams contain adaptogens that help balance cortisol levels, reducing stress and anxiety caused by hormonal imbalances.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties: St John's Wort's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which can contribute to hormonal imbalance symptoms such as mood swings and hot flashes.

Prolactin-regulating effects: St John's Wort extracts have been shown to regulate prolactin levels, a hormone involved in lactation and hormonal balance, helping alleviate symptoms of PMS, menopause, and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS).
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, St John's Wort roots are used to create creams that help regulate hormones and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
Flowers: The flowers of the St John's Wort plant contain hyperforin, a compound that has been shown to have estrogen-like properties, making them effective for hormonal imbalance treatment.
remedy_recipe: Collect 50g of dried st john's wort flowers and leaves from a trusted source for consistent quality.
Grind the herb into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or coffee grinder for 30 minutes.
Combine 25g of the powdered st john's wort with 20g of beeswax and 50g of coconut oil in a double boiler for 10 minutes.
Heat the mixture to 60-70°c while stirring occasionally until the beeswax melts completely and the mixture thickens after 15 minutes.
Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature before transferring the cream to an airtight container for storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Peppermint creams helps with hormonal imbalance because they promote relaxation and reduce stress, which are common triggers for hormonal imbalances. The menthol in peppermint has a calming effect on the body, helping to regulate cortisol levels and alleviate symptoms of PMS, such as bloating, mood swings, and cramps. Additionally, peppermint's natural anti-inflammatory properties can help soothe the uterus and other reproductive organs, promoting balance and harmony in the body's hormone production.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Peppermint creams can help reduce inflammation in the body, which can alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalances such as PMS and menopause, by reducing swelling and discomfort.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in peppermint creams can neutralize free radicals that can damage hormones and disrupt hormone balance, helping to regulate menstrual cycles and alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance.
Uterine relaxant properties: Peppermint creams may help relax the uterine muscles, reducing cramping and spasms associated with hormonal imbalances such as PMS and menopause.
remedy_parts: Roots: Peppermint roots are rich in flavonoids and terpenes, which have been shown to help regulate hormone production and balance.
Leaves: Peppermint leaves contain menthol, a natural anti-inflammatory that can help soothe symptoms of hormonal imbalance such as hot flashes and night sweats.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh peppermint leaves and dry them thoroughly in a warm oven at 150°f for 2 hours.
Combine 20 grams of dried peppermint leaves with 100 grams of coconut oil in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture over low heat for 2 hours, stirring occasionally, until the oil has infused with peppermint essence.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth into a clean glass container and discard solids.
Whip 200 grams of beeswax with 100 grams of shea butter and add the infused peppermint oil, mixing well to form a smooth cream.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chinese peony creams helps with hormonal imbalance because of its unique blend of botanicals, particularly the herb Paeonia lactiflora. This herb has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries to regulate menstrual cycles and alleviate symptoms associated with menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. The cream's anti-inflammatory properties also help to soothe hormonal imbalances by reducing inflammation in the body, which can contribute to mood swings and other symptoms. Additionally, the cream's adaptogenic properties help to balance cortisol levels, promoting overall hormonal harmony.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Peony's anti-inflammatory property helps to reduce inflammation in the body, which can alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances such as acne, bloating, and joint pain.

Regulatory effect on estrogen levels: The herb Peony has been shown to regulate estrogen levels by modulating the activity of enzymes involved in estrogen metabolism, thereby helping to restore balance to the endocrine system.

Antioxidant property: Peony's antioxidant properties help protect the body from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to hormonal imbalance and other chronic health issues.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in estrogen-like compounds, which help regulate hormonal balance and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
Rhyzomes: Contain flavonoids and saponins that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making them effective in soothing skin irritation caused by hormonal fluctuations.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried root of paeonia lactiflora and grind into fine powder using mortar and pestle for 15 minutes.
Mix 20% powdered paeonia lactiflora with 80% coconut oil and beeswax in a double boiler over low heat for 30 minutes.
Add 5% of vitamin e oil and 10% of jojoba oil to the mixture and stir well for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and let cool until reaches 120°f to 140°f temperature before whipping for 10 minutes.
Pour into sterile glass jars and store in a cool dark place for up to 6 months or refrigerate for longer storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Damask rose creams helps with hormonal imbalance because of its unique ability to regulate estrogen levels. The cream's active compounds, such as beta-damascenone and damascenone, have been shown to inhibit the activity of enzymes that convert testosterone into dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone linked to hormonal imbalance. Additionally, the cream's anti-inflammatory properties help reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances. By regulating estrogen levels and reducing inflammation, Damask rose creams promote a balanced hormonal environment, alleviating symptoms of menopause, PMS, and other hormonal disorders.
remedy_properties: Vasodilatory and antispasmodic effects: Damask rose creams can help relax blood vessels and reduce spasms, which can alleviate menstrual cramps, bloating, and other symptoms associated with PMS and hormonal imbalance.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties: Rose extracts in the cream have potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, which are linked to hormonal imbalances and related conditions like polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS).

Hormone-balancing flavonoids: Damask rose contains flavonoids, such as kaempferol and quercetin, which have been shown to help regulate estrogen metabolism and balance, reducing symptoms of hormonal imbalance like hot flashes, mood swings, and irregular periods.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and adaptogens, the roots of the damask rose plant help to regulate hormones and balance the body's natural rhythms.
Flowers: The delicate flowers of the damask rose contain fragrances and essential oils that can soothe menstrual cramps and alleviate symptoms of PMS.
remedy_recipe: Harvest rosa damascena flowers and dry them thoroughly for 24 hours to preserve potency.
Combine 100g of dried rosa damascena flowers with 200ml of cold-pressed jojoba oil in a clean glass jar.
Infuse the mixture in a warm dark place for 14 days, shaking the jar twice daily to extract essential oils and properties.
Strain the infusion through cheesecloth into another clean glass jar, discarding solids, and then add 20ml of beeswax and 10ml of vitamin e oil.
Melt the mixture in a double boiler for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until it reaches a smooth creamy consistency suitable for topical application.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Elder creams helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain natural compounds that promote hormonal balance in the body. The creams' active ingredients, such as phytoestrogens, mimic the effects of estrogen and progesterone, helping to regulate these hormones' levels. This can alleviate symptoms associated with menopause, PMS, and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS), including hot flashes, mood swings, and irregular periods. By normalizing hormone production, elder creams support overall reproductive health and well-being, leading to a more balanced and stable hormonal profile.
remedy_properties: Flavonoids: Elder cream contains flavonoids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, helping to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress associated with hormonal imbalances, such as PMS symptoms and menopausal hot flashes.

Saponins: Saponins in elder cream have estrogen-like properties, which can help regulate menstrual cycles, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and reduce the risk of hormone-dependent cancers by binding to estrogen receptors and blocking excessive estrogen activity.

Phenolic acids: Elder cream's phenolic acid content has been shown to have anti-proliferative and pro-apoptotic effects on cancer cells, which can help prevent or treat hormonal imbalances-related cancers like breast, prostate, and uterine cancer.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making them effective in reducing symptoms of hormonal imbalances such as hot flashes and mood swings.
Barks: Contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that help regulate estrogen levels and alleviate menstrual cramps, making it a valuable component for hormonal imbalance creams.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality sambucus nigra flowers and leaves in the morning after dew has dried.
Dry the sambucus nigra plant material using a food dehydrator on low heat for 24 hours.
Combine 20 grams of dried sambucus nigra flowers and leaves with 100ml of cold-pressed coconut oil and infuse at room temperature for 2 weeks.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth and discard solids before adding 10 drops of evening primrose oil and mixing well.
Transfer the herbal cream to sterilized glass jars and store in the refrigerator for up to 6 months or freeze for longer storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion creams helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain phytoestrogens, which mimic the effects of estrogen in the body. The plant's sap is rich in these compounds, which help to regulate and balance hormone levels by binding to estrogen receptors. This can alleviate symptoms associated with menopause, PMS, and other hormonal imbalances, such as hot flashes, mood swings, and breast tenderness. remedy_properties: Luteolytic activity: Dandelion cream contains compounds that stimulate the uterus to shed its lining, which can help to regulate menstruation and alleviate symptoms associated with polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) such as irregular periods.

Estrogen modulating properties: The bioactive compounds in dandelion cream have been shown to modulate estrogen levels by inhibiting or stimulating estrogen production, which can help to balance hormonal imbalances and alleviate symptoms of menopause, PMS, and endometriosis.

Anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activity: Dandelion cream's anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties can help to reduce inflammation in the body, which is often linked to hormonal imbalances, and protect against oxidative stress that can contribute to hormonal imbalance and related symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and phytoestrogens, which help regulate estrogen levels and alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance.
Seeds: Containing fatty acids and vitamins, they soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting hormone balance.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh dandelion leaves and flowers measure out 100 grams.
Dry the herbs using shade or low-temperature drying method for 24 hours.
Combine dried herbs with 200 grams of coconut oil and 50 grams of beeswax melt mixture at 150 degrees fahrenheit.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth to remove solids and transfer to glass jars sterilized beforehand preparation time 1 hour.
Store creams in airtight containers in refrigerator for up to 6 months shelf life.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Highbush cranberry creams helps with hormonal imbalance because it contains unique compounds that help regulate the body's endocrine system. The cream's active ingredients, such as vitamin C and flavonoids, work to balance estrogen levels and reduce inflammation in the body. This natural approach can alleviate symptoms of PMS, menopause, and other hormonal imbalances, promoting overall well-being and reducing stress on the body. Flavonoids: High levels of flavonoids, such as quercetin and kaempferol, in highbush cranberry creams may help regulate estrogen metabolism and reduce the risk of estrogen-related disorders like endometrial hyperplasia, which can be triggered by hormonal imbalances.

Vitamin C: The high concentration of vitamin C in highbush cranberry creams can support the body's natural detoxification processes, helping to remove excess estrogens from the body and reducing the risk of estrogen-related hormonal imbalances.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in phytoestrogens, which help balance estrogen levels and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
Barks: Contain salicin, a natural anti-inflammatory that relieves menstrual cramps and discomfort associated with hormonal imbalance.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 200g of dried american cranberries vaccinium macrocarpon at peak ripeness for optimal antioxidant properties.
Combine 100g of dried american cranberries with 50g of organic coconut oil in a double boiler setup.
Infuse the mixture under low heat for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, to facilitate gentle extraction of beneficial compounds.
Strain the infused mixture through cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass bowl, discarding solids and retaining liquid extract.
Mix 50ml of the cranberry-infused coconut oil with 20g of beeswax and 10g of vitamin e oil in a heat-proof bowl, melting at low temperature to create a smooth and creamy consistency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Valerian creams helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain a unique blend of botanicals that work in harmony to regulate the body's endocrine system. The root extract of valerian, rich in isovaleric acid and sesquiterpenes, has been traditionally used to calm the nervous system and reduce stress, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances. By promoting relaxation and reducing cortisol levels, herbal valerian creams help alleviate symptoms associated with PMS, menopause, and thyroid disorders, restoring balance to the body's hormone production and overall well-being.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic effects: Valerian's adaptogenic properties help to balance the body's response to stress, which can alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalances such as anxiety and insomnia.

Sedative and anti-anxiety effects: The sedative compounds in valerian cream, such as isovaleric acid and valerenic acid, can help to calm the nervous system and reduce anxiety and stress-related symptoms that are often associated with hormonal imbalances.

Antioxidant properties: Valerian's antioxidant properties may help to protect the body from oxidative stress caused by hormonal fluctuations, which can contribute to chronic inflammation and other health issues.

remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh valeriana officinalis roots and dry them thoroughly in a warm dark place for 7-10 days.
Grind the dried valeriana officinalis roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the ground valeriana officinalis powder with 200ml of carrier oil such as sweet almond oil or coconut oil at a ratio of 1:4.
Heat the mixture in a double boiler for 30-45 minutes to infuse the valeriana officinalis extract into the carrier oil.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth and mix it with 2% beeswax to create a stable and spreadable cream that can be stored at room temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Prairie toothpick creams helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain a unique blend of herbs that work synergistically to regulate the body's endocrine system. The natural ingredients, such as chamomile and dandelion root, help to calm the nervous system, reducing stress and anxiety that can contribute to hormonal imbalances. Additionally, the creams' ability to nourish and balance the skin's natural microbiome supports the body's natural detoxification processes, allowing hormones to function properly and maintaining overall health and well-being.
remedy_properties: Dong quai: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, dong quai helps regulate menstrual cycles, alleviate PMS symptoms, and reduce hot flashes due to its ability to normalize estrogen levels.
Red clover: High in isoflavones, red clover has been shown to mimic the effects of estrogen in the body, reducing symptoms of menopause such as hot flashes, night sweats, and vaginal dryness.
Black cohosh: Containing triterpenoids, black cohosh has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help alleviate hot flashes, mood swings, and sleep disturbances associated with menopause.

Rhyzomes: Contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory properties, reducing inflammation associated with hormonal fluctuations.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh zanthoxylum americanum bark and dry it in the shade for at least seven days.
Grind the dried bark into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for thirty seconds.
Combine one part ground zanthoxylum americanum with three parts coconut oil and mix well for two minutes.
Heat the mixture in a double boiler at a low temperature of 160 degrees fahrenheit for four hours.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into glass jars and store in the refrigerator.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: South American yerba creams help with hormonal imbalance because they contain a unique blend of botanicals that work harmoniously to balance and regulate hormone production in the body. Caffeoylquinic acids: These compounds have been found to exhibit estrogen-like effects, which can help balance estrogen levels and alleviate symptoms of menopause, polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS), and other hormonal disorders.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins, which help regulate estrogen levels and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
Rhyzomes: Contain sesquiterpenes that have anti-inflammatory properties, reducing inflammation associated with hormonal imbalance.

remedy_recipe: Collect and dry high-quality achyrocline satureioides herbs for at least two hours in a well-ventilated area.
Grind the dried herbs into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle, measuring 10 grams per batch.
Combine the herbal powder with 100 milliliters of coconut oil and 20 milliliters of beeswax, heating the mixture to 60 degrees celsius for one hour.
Remove the mixture from heat and let it cool until it reaches a consistency suitable for whipping, taking approximately three hours.
Whip the cooled mixture using a hand mixer or whisk until smooth and creamy, storing the finished cream in an airtight container at room temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow creams helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain potent phytoestrogens that mimic the effects of estrogen in the body. These natural compounds, particularly isoflavones, bind to estrogen receptors, regulating hormone production and promoting balance. Anti-inflammatory properties: Marshmallow cream's anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce inflammation in the body, which is often a contributing factor to hormonal imbalances such as endometriosis, PCOS, and thyroid disorders.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in mucilage, which helps to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation associated with hormonal imbalances.
Rhyzomes: Contain anti-inflammatory compounds that help to regulate hormonal fluctuations and reduce symptoms of menopause.
Leaves: Used for their antioxidant properties, which help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, promoting balanced hormone levels.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of dried marshmallow root althaea officinalis and grind it into a fine powder.
Mix 50g of coconut oil with 20g of beeswax and heat them together for 30 minutes at 180°f.
Add 10g of the ground marshmallow root to the heated mixture and stir well for 5 minutes.
Remove the mixture from heat and let it cool and solidify within 2 hours.
Once solidified, add 10ml of witch hazel and stir gently before pouring the cream into jars.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stinging nettle creams helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain compounds that have a profound effect on the endocrine system. Nettle's steroidal and flavonoid properties help to regulate hormone production, reducing inflammation and promoting balance in the body. This can be particularly beneficial for women experiencing menopausal symptoms such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as those with polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS). By reducing inflammation and promoting hormonal equilibrium, nettle creams can help alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalance, promoting a more balanced and healthy body.
remedy_properties: Flavonoids: Stinging nettle creams contain flavonoids, which have estrogenic properties that can help regulate and balance hormone levels by inhibiting the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone linked to hormonal imbalances.

Saponins: Saponins in stinging nettle creams have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress caused by hormonal imbalance, promoting overall hormonal balance and well-being.

Amino Acids: Stinging nettle creams contain amino acids such as glutamic acid and aspartic acid, which can help support the body's natural detoxification processes and reduce estrogen dominance, a common condition associated with hormonal imbalance.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins and flavonoids, which help balance hormone levels and reduce inflammation.
Flowers: Containing sesquiterpenes and other compounds, which have a sedative effect on the body and can help regulate hormone production.
remedy_recipe: Gather high-quality urtica dioica leaves and flowers in sufficient quantities for the desired amount of cream.
Dry the harvested plant material by spreading it thinly on paper bags or trays for 7-10 days.
Grind the dried herbs into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or coffee grinder, then sift through a fine-mesh sieve to remove lumps.
Combine 20% of the herbal powder with 80% coconut oil in a double boiler, heating until the mixture reaches a temperature of 180°f to 190°f over 30-40 minutes.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into glass containers, allowing it to cool and thicken at room temperature for 2-3 hours before use.

intro_desc: Herbal creams for hormonal imbalance are topical products infused with natural herbs and botanicals that help regulate hormonal fluctuations in the body. These creams work by reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and stimulating hormone production to alleviate symptoms such as hot flashes, mood swings, and skin issues. Examples of herbal creams that help with hormonal imbalance include those containing maca, dong quai, and chasteberry, which have been shown to ease menopause symptoms and improve overall well-being. By using these creams, women can experience relief from hormonal imbalances, leading to improved sleep, increased energy, and a sense of emotional balance, ultimately enhancing their overall quality of life.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat hormonal imbalance with herbal creams is to identify the specific symptoms you're experiencing, such as acne, hot flashes, or mood swings. Look for creams containing botanicals like saw palmetto, dong quai, and chasteberry, which have been traditionally used to regulate hormones. Apply the cream topically, ideally before bed, to allow it to absorb fully into the skin overnight. Consistency is key, so use the cream regularly to see optimal results.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to hormonal imbalance that are treated with herbal creams are acne, eczema, and psoriasis. Herbal creams containing ingredients like tea tree oil, lavender oil, and chamomile can help reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritation, and balance the body's natural response to skin conditions. Additionally, herbal creams may also be used to treat symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, using herbs like black cohosh and dong quai.
